Introduction
    Ryuga Dogai returns to investigate a new mystery - the theft of Makai Knights Armour. Among the victims are Ryuga's old comrades from the Volcity crisis, Takeru and Aguri. The three will face off against an enemy previously though...

Also known as: Kị Sĩ Ma Giới: Thần Nha
